The Starfox is a foxy vendor found inside the server spawn. Items within Starfox are bought with [seasonal currency](../items/starshards.md).
However, starfox can also be accessed anywhere using /starfox
## Inventory Changes

The Starfox's inventory periodically changes with new updates. Below are listed changes of the Starfox's inventory.
Starfox used to change every season, but was randomly changed to bi-monthly (every 2 months).


## Year: 2024

### Demon's Den update.

<img src="https://puppies.digitalpawprint.gallery/go/HPvQBh" alt="OG Starfox Menu">
    - Season 1 of OtterSMP, 'Demon Den', this crate contained a few pieces of furniture, cuddly lootboxs, keys and packages alongside weapons, armor and a few cosmetic items for player to buy. This starfox stayed until Halloween where it was replaced by Haunte Hallows.
    - Currency that was used back then
<img src="https://puppies.digitalpawprint.gallery/go/e6Ptpu" alt="OG Starshards">
